titleStmt.title: SII 26.427: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 427. (A.R. No. 406 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the same prākāra.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅgachōḷadēva II: Year 10, Mithuna (Āṉi) 29 = 1143 A.D., June 23, (Wednesday).

summary.p: This inscription which is slightly damaged contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmēvu vaḷar Tirupponmādu, etc., and mentions the queen Buvanimuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.

It records the gift of 5 kāśu, 2(1/2) kāśu each by [••• •••••] Īśvaradēvan and by Kauśikan Ārāvamudu Panmanābhan of Śiṟṟiṅgūr for two sandhi lamps to be burnt in the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of the same Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple received the money and agreed to burn the lamps.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevuvaḷar tirupponamātu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vijayamāmakaḷ velpuyattiruppa Icaiyin celviyumeṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar van=tiṟaiñca ni
ṇilamaṭann=taiyait tirumaṇampuṇarntu cirvaḷar tarumam Aṇimuṭi kavittena maṇimuṭi cūṭimallai nālattup palluyirkkellā melḷaiyilinpamiyalvinileyti veṇkuṭai niḻaṟk kiḻcce
ṅkolocci vāḻi pallūḻi Āḻi naṭappac cempon virasiṁhāsanattup puvanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakesarivarmarāna tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10ttā
vatu midhuṉanāyaṟṟut tiyati Irupattoṉpatiṉāl rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Āḷūṭaiyār tiruppulippakavatevar koyilil civabrāhmaṇarom Ubhayam Ivvūr A
ppāran Īśvaratevan pakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭaraiyum Ivvūr kaucikan Ārāvamutu panmanābhan kaikkoṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭaraiyum Āka kācu Aiñcu Ikkācu Aiñcuṅkoṇṭu Ivai mutal Iraṇṭu viḷakku candrādityavat sandhi Erikka kaṭavomāka sammatittu Ikkācañcuṅ koṇṭom Ikkoyilil civabrāhmaṇarom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai 0§
Digital edition of SII 26.427 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
